Phoenix Universe AI

Phoenix Universe AI is an exciting idea for the future of digital art and games. It will team up with various tools, kind of like how we're talking now. Think of it as three awesome places: Phoenix Galleria AI, Phoenix Chronicle AI, and Phoenix Spark AI. Each of them is like a different adventure with special things for people to do.

Claim AirdropBuy
Phoenix Galleria AI - NFT Market place 
This NFT marketplace is a special space for game developers, artists, and more. It's different from regular places because it has digital items, including NFTs, which are like special digital things you can own. People who create games or make art can find and share their cool stuff here. Phoenix Galleria AI is more than just a marketplace; it's also a fun community showing what digital things can do with cool technology.
Phoenix Chronicle AI – An NFT PvP Game
Phoenix Chronicle AI is like a game where players can compete against each other (PvP) or challenge AI robots, making gaming more exciting. It's a place where being smart and skilled is super important, letting players have intense and strategic battles. Whether you're playing against other people or computer opponents, Phoenix Chronicle AI offers a thrilling gaming experience that relies on your skills.
Phoenix Spark AI - Text to NFT platform. 
Phoenix Spark AI is a platform where you can change your written words into special digital items. It's like turning your writing into unique digital things using technology. This platform is all about transforming text into NFTs and will work together with Midjourney API, making the process even cooler. It helps writers, poets, and dreamers keep their words in a special way. Phoenix Spark AI is a tool for creating digital artworks that express yourself and show your creativity. Each digital item is more than just a token; it's like having a piece of art and a part of your digital legacy.
Phoenix Mirage AI - NFT market place for AR and VR

Phoenix Mirage AI is like a super cool platform for AR (Augmented Reality) and VR (Virtual Reality). It's a special place where digital art and stories mix with a bit of real-world magic. Imagine wearing AR glasses and seeing amazing things added to the world around you, or putting on a VR headset to be in a whole new virtual world. Each NFT is like a special key that unlocks fun experiences in both digital and real worlds. It's like having a cool dinosaur pop up in your room or exploring an awesome virtual space. Phoenix Mirage shows how we can play and be creative with AR and VR in the future!

Vision To Reality - The Milestone Map For Phoenix AI

Highlights the transformation of visionary ideas into tangible achievements.

Phase 1

FOUNDATIONAL ANALYSIS
    • Conducting market research and feasibility studies.
    • Developing a detailed business model and strategy.
    • Identifying potential partnerships for marketing and collaborations.
    • Website Launch.

Phase 2

FUNDRAISING INITIATIVE & Token Creation
    • Tokenomics design
    • Create PXAI Token Contract
    • Audit Contract
    • KYC
    • Conducting Pre-Sale to expand investor base and raise additional funds.

Phase 3

TOKEN LAUNCH & NFTs Creation
    • Create 3D Characters specifically tailored for the Phoenix Chronicle NFT Game
    • Officially launching the PXAI Token.
    • Beginning trading on select cryptocurrency exchanges.
    • Implementing initial marketing campaigns to boost token adoption.
    • CMC & CG Listings
    • CEX Listings

Phase 4

PHOENIX GALLERIA Market Place AND CHRONICLE NFTs
    • Launching Phoenix Galleria, the NFT marketplace for diverse digital assets.
    • Create NFTs specifically tailored for the Phoenix Chronicle NFT Game.
    • Launch NFTs for the Game on Phoenix Galleria.

Phase 5

PHOENIX CHRONICLE PLATFORM LAUNCH
    • Officially launching the Phoenix Chronicle Game.
    • Releasing initial game content and features.
    • Engaging the gaming community through events and promotions.

Phase 6

PHOENIX SPARK LAUNCH
    • Introducing Phoenix Spark AI, the innovative text-to-NFT platform.
    • Empowering creators with new tools for digital expression.
    • Integrating with Midjourney API for the NFT Marketplace.

Phase 7

PHOENIX MIRAGE LAUNCH
    • Debuting Phoenix Mirage, the VR/AR NFT game and marketplace.
    • Offering unique, immersive digital experiences.
    • Pioneering in merging VR/AR technology with blockchain and NFTs.

Why Invest In Phoenix AI

Empower Your Portfolio with Purpose

Increase Token Token Value through Buy-Back and Burn

We will buy back and burn tokens in a unique process, gradually reducing the total token supply. This has the potential to increase the value of the tokens over time. We use profits from our marketplace to support this approach, showing our commitment to long-term growth and providing benefits to investors.

Donating to make a difference worldwide

A portion of our earnings from both the NFT marketplace and the NFT game goes to Binance Charity, connecting your investment to meaningful social contributions. This way, your investment not only participates in the NFT market but also contributes to positive social impact

Create NFTs from Words: Easy and Fun with Mid-Journey Integration

Get Creative: With Mid-Journey Integration, you can easily turn your words into special NFTs. Just enter your ideas, play around, and see the magic happen as you experiment with different prompts to create unique digital art effortlessly. Join the NFT revolution and express yourself in the digital world with your own personalized touch!
